falsification_conditions.condition: The S&P 500 closes above the 200-day moving average by more than 5% within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A strong bullish trend would contradict the HOLD signal, indicating the pattern is not playing out as expected.

falsification_conditions.condition: The blowoff score increases to 60 or higher within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A blowoff event would invalidate the HOLD signal, as it suggests a rapid price surge contrary to the current unknown verdict.

falsification_conditions.condition: Crude oil (Brent) drops below $70 per barrel by more than 15% within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A significant decline in oil prices would indicate a market shift inconsistent with the bottom_2024_aug pattern, falsifying the current HOLD.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
